title: Crumbly Spicy Moroccan Savoy Cabbage Stir-fry
description: A quick-fix low-carb-friendly Moroccan dish featuring spicy savoy cabbage stir-fried with a blend of aromatic spices and bhuna masala.
instructions: Slice the savoy cabbage into thin strips, and finely chop the onion.
Dice the garlic cloves into small pieces.
Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat. Add onions and sauté until translucent.
Add sliced cabbage to the pan along with minced garlic, bhuna masala, turmeric powder, cayenne pepper, salt (to taste), and enough water to cover the vegetables.
Stir-fry for about 10 minutes or until the cabbage is tender but still crisp. Adjust seasoning if needed.
Serve hot as a snack accompaniment.
